content: MCP servers in mcp-server/ directory. Tools prefixed with mcp_<server-name>_. MCP integration layer in src/services/mcp/. Server configs in mcp-server/server.json. MCP tools are dynamically discovered and may be added/removed during sessions via tools/list_changed notifications.

name: MCP Integration
description: MCP (Model Context Protocol) integration in src/services/mcp/. Provides tool discovery, resource management, and server connections. MCP tools exposed as regular tools with mcp__ prefix.
MCP server safePath() didn't handle paths like 'src/tools/AgentTool' when SRC_ROOT was already '/app/src', resulting in double-src path '/app/src/src/tools/AgentTool'.
resolution: Updated safePath() to strip leading 'src/' from paths when SRC_ROOT already ends with '/src'.
